_about: Declared per-PR/issue milestone+label overrides for Mycelium. The escape hatch for items with no inferable milestone (no task-id, no mapped scope). Each entry is an explicit, ratified per-item decision — NOT inference — and wins over task-id and scope fallback with highest precedence (G2: never-invent complement). Consumed by gh-issues-sync.py --prs/--issues.
_policy: Keys are PR/issue numbers (as strings). Each value is an object with a required 'milestone' (must be an exact title from milestones.json; validated by --validate) and an optional 'labels' list (union-added, never removed; each must exist in labels.json). A typo in 'milestone' or an unknown label name fails --validate before any live run. Rationale for each override is recorded in '_rationale' (informational only; not consumed by the engine). Flag items the maintainer should confirm before treating as final are noted in '_confirm'.
_confirm: #67: RFC-0006 is the L1/L2/L3 layering RFC — Phase 4 (ABI/language integration) seems right, but could be Phase 5 (Self-Hosting & Core Library) if it is considered a surface-language self-hosting prerequisite. Confirm.
#69: Early L1 parser prototype — placed in Phase 4 (the L1/grammar track lives there per milestone description), but could be Phase 1 (Minimal Viable Core) if this is a bootstrap parser. Confirm.
#70: ADR-012 lexicon integration doc — placed in Phase 1 (lexicon is a foundation-spec item), but could be Phase 0 (Confirm & Specify) if ADR-012 is a spec-ratification decision. Confirm.

#293: RP-8 perf optimization + tool-extraction spike — placed in Phase 8 (Toolchain & Release Engineering, the natural home for tool-extraction), but could be Phase 3 (Tooling, Projections & Acceleration) for the perf side. Confirm.

1._rationale: docs: align corpus with design baseline versions — baseline versioning is a Phase 0 spec-ratification task (no scope → no scope fallback; Declared override).

67.milestone: Phase 4 — Interpreted↔Compiled ABI, Hot-Inject & AOT-Fragment Completion
67._rationale: RFC-0006 Surface language & term-language layering (L1/L2/L3) — the ABI/language integration phase is the natural home for surface-language layering. FLAG: could be Phase 5. Confirm with maintainer.

69.milestone: Phase 4 — Interpreted↔Compiled ABI, Hot-Inject & AOT-Fragment Completion
69._rationale: feat(l1,grammar): surface grammar + conformance corpus + parser prototype — the L1/grammar track is in Phase 4 per the milestone description (ADR-016/017 + M-346 stdlib roadmap). FLAG: could be Phase 1 if this is the bootstrap parser. Confirm with maintainer.

70._rationale: docs: verify + integrate the lexicon docs (ADR-012) — ADR-012 lexicon integration is a foundation document that underpins the minimal viable core spec. FLAG: could be Phase 0. Confirm with maintainer.

135._rationale: chore(mlir): fix codespell finding — a maintenance chore on MLIR code; MLIR→LLVM native acceleration is Phase 6.

143._rationale: feat: unified GitHub project reconciler (labels, milestones, issues, PRs, Project v2) — the PM toolchain is Phase 8 (Toolchain & Release Engineering). No scope → no scope fallback; Declared override.

292._rationale: docs: 1.0.0 ratification wave — ADR-021 Accepted — ratification/release-gate documentation is Phase 8 (Toolchain & Release Engineering). No scope → no scope fallback; Declared override.

293._rationale: docs(RP-8): performance optimization + tool-extraction spike — tool-extraction is the Phase 8 toolchain concern (M-361 epic anchor). FLAG: the perf side could be Phase 3. Confirm with maintainer.
